votes.rationale: motion-0027 wires the execution-loop foundations from motions 0025 and 0026 into the operator work surfaces, making lane state and governed routing actions actually usable from the UI.
The scope is appropriately limited to UI wiring and shared helper consumption. It preserves operator control, SoT visibility, and avoids unsafe autonomy or unnecessary schema churn.
Unanimous consent satisfied. This motion cleanly completes the execution-loop surface by exposing current lane, next lane, and governed routing actions through the operator UI.
